title: Fan made reproduction trailer for 20 Ramiel battle page 5
display_title: Fan made reproduction trailer for 20 Ramiel battle page 5
wikitext:
[]: Fan-made reproduction trailer for 2.0 + Ramiel battle page 5             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu Sep 13, 2007 4:29 pm http://www.evangelion-not-end.ru/Video/art-trailer2.flv Includes sketches of the new Evas, characters and text. Can someone who saw it confirm? EDIT: I'd like to add that Evas 05 and 06 are boner inducing.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 13, 2007 4:40 pm Hot damn. I love it when geeks do this sort of stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Annihilator » Thu Sep 13, 2007 4:44 pm I cant view it T-T but from what The Eva Monkey said, it must be pretty good

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Sep 13, 2007 5:08 pm can't see it either and I demand to see it......please. :evil:

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Sep 13, 2007 5:13 pm 1) Right click, save as 2) Open in VLC 3) ?????? 4) PROFIT

[]:             Quote Post by Yasha » Thu Sep 13, 2007 5:15 pm Annihilator wrote: I cant view it T-T

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 13, 2007 5:32 pm Use VLC or Media Player Classic. Google it if you have neither.

[]: Re: Fan-made reproduction of trailer for Evangelion 2.0             Quote Post by machinamar » Thu Sep 13, 2007 5:47 pm Wow, awesome stuff, kudos to whoever did this. The first movie just came out and now we're already hungry for the next one haha. Szmitten wrote: I'd like to add that Evas 05 and 06 are boner inducing.

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Thu Sep 13, 2007 6:25 pm Sexy.

[]:             Quote Post by Sandoz » Thu Sep 13, 2007 7:37 pm I have Media Player Classic, but it only plays the sound. Woe.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 13, 2007 7:41 pm Wow, that's actually pretty close to the real preview, except it doesn't show Eva-04 as an explosion

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Sep 13, 2007 7:50 pm Everything's cooler with explosions! Anyway, that was rather sexy, but what's all this then about Eva Unit-06 coming from teh Moon? The Rebuild Audio reveals that "It's trrue! it's trrue!" but. Um. Yeah. btw, playing the fanmade trailer with the Rebuild Next Time Preview audio in the background is indeed "boner-inducing".

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Sep 13, 2007 8:29 pm So, it looks like it's true what the IMDB forum thing said about the "Lilin" being another Angel... perhaps it's implying GG's an Angel? Does Lilin == Lilim? They're the same in Biblical lore... And, finally, Adam s ?!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Sep 13, 2007 8:39 pm "Lilin" is actually how Kaworu-kun pronounces Lilim in Japanese, it's just one of those crazy "LOLZ! N as M cases" again. e.g: Although it's really "senpai", people tend to spell it as "seMpai" instead. With AdamS....that makes me wonder, myself. GG an Angel as well as as being a Pilot, would be kinda cool provided: 1) It's not similar to what went down with Kaworu, battle or otherwise. Basically, none of that SoL stuff since THAT title belongs to Adam and Lilith thank you very much! 2) It's not similar to the deal with Mayumi; while I haven't played the game, I know this much: She's ALSO a Glasses-girl, but is infected with a Game-created Angel or some such thing.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Sep 14, 2007 5:55 am Quoting Cartman: "Sweet!".

[]:             Quote Post by Krennn » Fri Sep 14, 2007 1:18 pm well that makes me sad, my vlc doesnt play it... screw you player.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 14, 2007 1:27 pm I'll create a SWF handler for this when I get off work.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Fri Sep 14, 2007 1:43 pm Can someone YouTube this or something .... anything to get my computer to play it

[]:             Quote Post by Annihilator » Fri Sep 14, 2007 2:19 pm Mr. Tines wrote: 1) Right click, save as 2) Open in VLC 3) ?????? 4) PROFIT

[]:             Quote Post by pen^2 » Fri Sep 14, 2007 5:23 pm You could try downloading a FLV player, i.e. http://www.martijndevisser.com/blog/flv-player there's also a more basic version on YouTube but it shows the new character in a little more detail http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NbS1rn6gl3E
